best_reduced_candidate.reduction_method: weighted greedy 16 shortwave g-point subset with boundary-aware table, component, structural, objective-probe, surface-probe, capped table, continuation, post-capped weight, post-weight surface-table, bounded weight, four current component-scale refits, selected current gas-pressure component scan refit, gas-pressure continuation refit, weighted gas-pressure continuation refit, and high-weight gas-pressure continuation refit

breeze_summary.workload: RCEMIP-style nontrivial column ensemble without expensive spinup

ncrcat.note: ncrcat resolves to the Julia concat shim used for CKDMIP raw chunk assembly.

requirements.requirement: Demonstrate parity with ecRad for full-accuracy models and reduced ecCKD models such as 16- and 32-band variants.
requirements.finding: Full official ecCKD 32x32 passes, but currently measured reduced 16-g shortwave candidates fail the hard thresholds.

requirements.requirement: Demonstrate that reduced models meet accuracy criteria when compared to RRTMGP for representative atmosphere states.
requirements.finding: RRTMGP comparison metrics are emitted for the official 32x32 path on representative states, but reduced 16-g candidates do not yet pass hard accuracy criteria.

requirements.requirement: Demonstrate that the new radiation models can be integrated into Breeze simulations dynamically without blowing them up.
requirements.finding: The dedicated Breeze RCEMIP-style H100 artifact records a supported official ecCKD 32/32 runtime, passed gas-model accuracy status, and a finite >=4x RRTMGP speedup.

requirements.requirement: Reimplement the ecCKD training pipeline and demonstrate success by recovering one published model while varying only optimizer settings.
requirements.finding: Teacher-student coefficient recovery passes and upstream CKDMIP data is present, but exact original-objective recovery is blocked until the derived ecCKD 5gas/rel training flux products are generated.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.gap: Full official ecCKD 32x32 passes, but currently measured reduced 16-g shortwave candidates fail the hard thresholds.

Reimplement the ecCKD training pipeline and demonstrate success by recovering one published model while varying only optimizer settings.
